# Essentia Wellness Club — Complete Reference

> Essentia is a longevity center and social wellness club located at Baobab Suites, Costa Adeje, Tenerife, Canary Islands, Spain. It integrates regenerative medicine, evidence-based wellness protocols, and an exclusive community under one roof. All services are bookable online at https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/booking. Available in English and Spanish.

---

## Identity

- **Full name:** Essentia Wellness Club
- **Tagline:** For those who take the long view.
- **Mission:** A longer life should also be a better one.
- **Description:** Essentia brings together regenerative medicine, longevity protocols, and an exclusive community in one intentional space, rooted in Tenerife, designed for those who understand that how you live matters as much as how long.
- **Type:** Longevity center, social wellness club, medical spa
- **Language:** English and Spanish (website available in both)

---

## Contact & Location

- **Address:** Baobab Suites, Costa Adeje, Tenerife, Canary Islands, Spain
- **Website:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com
- **Email:** info@essentiawellnessclub.com
- **Phone 1:** +34 683 240 986
- **Phone 2:** +34 633 762 228
- **Booking URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/booking
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/essentiamassage
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/essentia
- **YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/essentia
- **Booking hours:** 8:00 AM – 7:30 PM (30-minute slots)
- **Map:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/63DC95GEfWDydgrg8

---

## Three Pillars

**Wellness** — Thermal contrast, manual therapies, breathwork, and red light. A full spectrum of physical restoration.

**Medicine** — Regenerative protocols, IV therapy, and hyperbaric oxygen. Clinical science and precision care in service of longevity.

**Community** — Running club, education programs, and exclusive memberships. Belonging to something meaningful.

---

## Philosophy

- Evidence first: Every protocol is grounded in peer-reviewed science.
- Whole-person care: Longevity is sleep, movement, nutrition, community, and purpose. Essentia treats all of it.
- Honest medicine: Transparent about what the data says. No hype, no shortcuts.
- Full spectrum: No single modality is enough. Thermal, light, breath, touch, and movement work as one integrated system.
- Adaptive: Each session follows your current state — recovery, activation, or calibration.
- Cumulative: Restoration compounds over time. Regular practice builds a baseline of resilience.

---

## Team

- **Dr. Carlos Mendez** — Medical Director, Longevity & Regenerative Medicine
- **Ana Torres** — Head of Wellness, Manual Therapies & Breathwork
- **Liam Fischer** — Community Director, Movement & Running Club
- **Dr. Sofia Alarcon** — Head of Nutrition, Metabolic & Nutritional Health

---

## Wellness Services

### Contrast Therapy
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/contrast-therapy
- **Duration:** 60 minutes
- **Price:** €45 per session
- **Description:** Alternating heat and cold to activate recovery and reduce inflammation. Protocol: three rounds of 12–15 min sauna (80–90°C) followed by 2–3 min cold plunge (10–15°C).
- **Recommended frequency:** 2–3 sessions per week
- **Benefits:** Faster muscle recovery, reduced inflammation, improved circulation, mood elevation via endorphin release

### Breathing Sessions
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/breathing-sessions
- **Duration:** 45 minutes
- **Price:** €35 per session
- **Formats:** Group sessions (twice a week) and private 1:1
- **Methods:** Wim Hof breathing, coherence breathing, box breathing, CO2 tolerance training
- **Recommended frequency:** 1–2 sessions per week
- **Benefits:** Stress reduction, improved HRV, enhanced oxygen efficiency, better sleep

### Red Light Therapy
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/red-light-therapy
- **Duration:** 20 minutes
- **Price:** €25 per session
- **Equipment:** Full-body medical-grade panels
- **Wavelengths:** Red 630–670 nm + near-infrared 810–850 nm
- **Recommended frequency:** 3–5 sessions per week
- **Benefits:** Cellular repair, collagen stimulation, muscle recovery, skin health, mitochondrial activation

### Manual Therapies
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/manual-therapies
- **Description:** 10 precision massage and bodywork treatments tailored to recovery, performance, relaxation, or aesthetics. Available at-centre or in-suite at Baobab Suites.

#### ESPIRA
- Express neck and shoulder ritual. Deep gliding manoeuvres with essential oils.
- 30 min · €90 (centre) / €120 (suite)

#### PULSE
- Deep-tissue massage for chronic contractures. Friction, ischaemic compression, passive mobilisation.
- 45 min · €100 (centre) / €130 (suite)

#### DRENAJE LINFÁTICO BRASILEÑO
- Rhythmic lymphatic drainage. Reduces fluid retention, sculpts and smooths skin.
- 50 min · €100 (centre) / €130 (suite)

#### ESSENTIA ACTIVE
- Sports recovery massage. Neuromuscular compression and assisted stretching.
- 45 min · €110 (centre) / €140 (suite)

#### NURTURA
- Prenatal massage for second and third trimesters. Gentle, safe, deeply restorative.
- 50 min · €130 (centre) / €160 (suite)

#### SERENNA
- Full-body relaxation with warm oils and slow, flowing movements.
- 50 min · €130 (centre) / €160 (suite)

#### SOLÉA
- Post-sun ritual: aloe vera wrap followed by a full-body massage.
- 70 min · €150 (centre) / €180 (suite)

#### SOMA
- Intensive myofascial release. Deep-tissue techniques and joint mobilisation.
- 60 min · €160 (centre) / €190 (suite)

#### LUME
- Craniofacial massage, foot reflexology, and personalised aromatherapy.
- 80 min · €220 (centre) / €250 (suite)

#### ALURE DUO
- Synchronised ritual for two, with two therapists working simultaneously.
- 50 min · €270 (centre only)

#### ESSENTIA (Signature)
- Complete protocol: peel, hydrating wrap, rejuvenating facial, and full-body massage.
- 120 min · €350 (centre only — not available in-suite)

### Functional Well-Being
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/functional-well-being
- **Duration:** 50 minutes
- **Price:** €65 per session
- **Formats:** 1:1 or small groups of up to 3
- **Session structure:** Movement assessment → structured training block (strength, mobility, or cardiovascular) → cool-down
- **Recommended frequency:** 2–3 sessions per week
- **Goal:** Build the physical foundation for a longer, healthier life

---

## Medicine Services

All medicine services are medically supervised. Initial consultations and comprehensive blood/biomarker testing required before some protocols.

### Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/medicine/hyperbaric-chambers
- **Duration:** 60 minutes
- **Price:** €120 per session
- **Description:** 100% pure oxygen at 1.5–3× atmospheric pressure to accelerate tissue repair and reduce inflammation.
- **Protocols:** Performance and recovery (10–20 sessions); therapeutic protocols (40+ sessions)
- **Benefits:** Faster healing, neurological support, reduced inflammation, stem cell mobilisation

### IV Therapy
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/medicine/intravenous-therapy
- **Duration:** 45–90 min (NAD+ typically 2–3 hours)
- **Description:** Direct nutrient delivery for rapid absorption and cellular support. 100% bioavailability. Administered by medical professionals.
- **Available formulas:**
  - High-dose Vitamin C — immune support and antioxidant protection
  - NAD+ therapy — cellular energy, DNA repair, cognitive function
  - Myers Cocktail — B vitamins, magnesium, calcium, Vitamin C
  - Glutathione — master antioxidant for detoxification and skin health
  - Custom amino acid blends — for recovery or performance goals
- **Recommended frequency:** Once every 2–4 weeks for general wellness

### Regenerative Medicine
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/medicine/regenerative-medicine
- **Duration:** 30, 60, or 90 minutes depending on protocol
- **Description:** Protocols that activate the body's own repair mechanisms. Integrated within a comprehensive longevity framework.
- **Available treatments:**
  - Platelet-rich plasma (PRP) therapy — tissue and joint regeneration
  - Peptide protocols — hormonal and metabolic optimisation
  - Ozone therapy — oxygenation and antimicrobial support
  - Personalised longevity assessments — biomarker analysis, biological age estimation
- **Requires:** Medical consultation and comprehensive testing before starting

---

## Memberships

Bookable at: https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/community/memberships

### Essential — €199/month
Full access to all wellness facilities, group sessions, and community events.
- All wellness facilities (contrast therapy, red light therapy)
- Group breathwork sessions
- Community events (running club, education programs)
- Essentia app access
- Billing: Monthly | Cancellation: 30 days written notice

### Premium — €349/month (Most Popular)
Everything in Essential, plus priority booking and monthly medical consultation.
- Priority booking
- Personalised wellness protocol
- Monthly medical consultation
- 20% discount on IV therapy
- 2 guest passes per month
- Exclusive member workshops
- Billing: Monthly | Cancellation: 30 days written notice

### Founder — €699/month (Limited Availability)
Full ecosystem access with a dedicated health advisor and founding member status.
- Dedicated personal health advisor
- Unlimited guest privileges
- Quarterly longevity panel (comprehensive biomarker testing)
- Priority access to all treatments
- Founding member events and private lounge access
- Billing: Monthly | Cancellation: 30 days written notice

---

## Community Programs

### Running Club
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/community/running-club
- **Schedule:** Every Saturday at 7:30 AM
- **Location:** Costa Adeje, Tenerife
- **Description:** Weekly coastal routes through Costa Adeje. All fitness levels welcome. Shared breakfast after the run.
- **Philosophy:** No race, no ego — just movement and connection.
- **Included in:** All membership tiers

### Education Programs
- **URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/community/education-programs
- **Frequency:** Monthly masterclasses and workshops
- **Description:** Talks, workshops, and immersive programs on longevity, nutrition, movement, and medicine. Led by researchers and longevity practitioners.
- **Included in:** All membership tiers

---

## Booking Information

- **Booking URL:** https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/booking
- **Hours:** 8:00 AM – 7:30 PM, 30-minute appointment slots
- **Payment:** Redsys (Santander TPV) — major credit and debit cards
- **Languages:** English and Spanish
- **Location options:** At the centre (Baobab Suites) or in-suite (for eligible manual therapies)
- **Introductory visits:** Available for prospective members — includes a guided tour and a complimentary session
